mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.student_no, u.name, s.class_id, c.name AS class_name, c.major_id, m.name AS major_name, m.department_id, d.name AS department_name, s.admission_date, s.graduation_date, s.gender, CASE s.gender WHEN 0 THEN '男' WHEN 1 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS gender_desc, s.id_card, s.birthday, s.address, s.status, CASE s.status WHEN 0 THEN '在读' WHEN 1 THEN '毕业' WHEN 2 THEN '休学' WHEN 3 THEN '退学' ELSE '未知' END AS status_desc, u.email, u.phone, s.create_time FROM student s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN department d ON m.department_id = d.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT d.name AS departmentName, COUNT(s.id) AS studentCount FROM student s JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.id JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id JOIN department d ON m.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY studentCount DESC
SELECT c.name AS className, COUNT(s.id) AS studentCount FROM student s JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY studentCount DESC
SELECT c.grade AS grade, COUNT(s.id) AS studentCount FROM student s JOIN class c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY c.grade ORDER BY c.grade
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.gender = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS maleCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.gender = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS femaleCount FROM student s

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS studyingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS graduatedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspendedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS droppedCount FROM student s
SELECT id FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}
